title: Plasplug MNF555 Multi Size Plasterboard Fixing
description: Product Description Plasplug Multi-Size Plasterboard Fixings come in 5 different sizes to accommodate various wall thicknesses. Plasterboard walls vary in thickness because boards come in different gauges, and wall coverings - e.g. tiles - make walls deeper. The clip pack includes a total of 50 fixings with 5 different size fixings, including:6 x fixings for 7mm walls.6 x fixings for 12mm walls.24 x standard fixings for 15mm walls.8 x fixings for 17mm walls.6 x fixings for 22mm walls.Depth gauge included to measure the wall and match fixing. Founded in 1970, Plasplugs' first product was the General Purpose wall plug, the first plastic plug to sell effectively in the market place. Today, Plasplugs still manufacture plastic plugs, but has extended its portfolio to include fasteners, tiling tools, knives, abrasives, electrical products and power tools. Their mission is to make difficult jobs easier. Renowned for innovation, Plasplugs invests considerably in research and design, frequently launching new products. The newest and most exciting product is the Diamond Wheel Tile Cutter. Its unique water recycling system avoids hazardous water spillage and allows water to be re-used- no more constant refilling. Legal Disclaimer 5 Box Contains 6 x fixings for 7mm walls;6 x fixings for 12mm walls;24 x standard fixings for 15mm walls;8 x fixings for 17mm walls;6 x fixings for 22mm walls;1 x depth gauge See more
